use_cases: Displaying loading states during async operations in web applications
Providing visual feedback while fetching data from APIs
Indicating progress during page transitions or content loading
Enhancing user experience with animated waiting indicators
ai_summary: A responsive folding cube loading indicator that displays four animated faces rotating and folding in sequence to indicate loading or processing states. Supports dark/light theme modes and multiple size variants. Uses CSS transforms with rotation and scale to create a 3D folding effect, making it visually engaging while remaining lightweight and performant for any loading scenario.
